title: Raw images acquired with enGLOW
author: Planchette, Arielle
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A subset of the images in the enGLOW manuscript under review are available in this repository. Due to the large size of the dataset, the subset is limited to images used to make comparative quantitative analyses and indicative of the different markers we established at this stage with the enGLOW method. If access to the larger images (for example from human colon resections), please contact the corresponding author.
steps_raw: A subset of the images in the enGLOW manuscript under review are available in this repository.
